Gary Jordan: Houston, we have a podcast. Welcome to the official podcast of the NASA Johnson Space Center, Episode 239, The Crew-4 Astronauts.

NASA's Commercial Crew Program continues, launching a crew of four astronauts from NASA and ESA on a U.S. commercial spacecraft on the fourth crew rotation mission to the International Space Station.

On Episode 239, the astronauts of NASA's SpaceX Crew-4 mission describe their anticipation for the upcoming crew rotation mission to the International Space Station. These interviews were recorded throughout January and February of 2022.

From Earth orbit to the Moon and Mars, explore the world of human spaceflight with NASA each week on the official podcast of the Johnson Space Center in Houston, Texas.
